core.description: Always active. Commit protocol, verification, security hygiene, dependency management

shell.description: Bash/shell projects. Quoting, portability, signal handling, BATS testing

python.description: Python projects. Typing, packaging, pytest, async conventions

frontend.description: Web frontend. Component architecture, a11y, CSS methodology, performance

database.description: Database engineering. Schema design, migration safety, query discipline

go.description: Go projects. Error handling, concurrency, interfaces, modules

rust.description: Rust projects. Ownership, error handling, unsafe discipline, cargo conventions

typescript.description: TypeScript/Node.js. Strict mode, async discipline, backend patterns

perl.description: Perl projects. strict/warnings, three-arg open, Moo/Moose OOP

php.description: PHP 8.x. Strict types, PSR standards, Laravel/Symfony patterns

infrastructure.description: Infrastructure as code. Terraform, Kubernetes, Ansible, CI/CD
